use_cases: Display loading states during data fetching operations
Show progress indication for async workflows
Breadcrumb loading animation during page transitions
ai_summary: A minimalist loading indicator component featuring an animated SVG path with stroke-dashoffset animation that creates a text drawing/shimmer effect. The component renders a breadcrumb-style loader with smooth stroke animations, suitable for displaying loading states across various SaaS, e-commerce, and fintech applications.
